name: validationcontract
author: Siemens Product Lifecycle Management Software Inc.

createARVisibleCond0.expression: ((conditions.createARVisibleCond1 === true || conditions.createARVisibleCond2 === true || conditions.createARVisibleCond3 === true || conditions.createARVisibleCond4 === true || conditions.createARVisibleCond3 === true ) && ctx.xrtSummaryContextObject.type !== 'Fnd0SearchRecipe') || conditions.createARVisibleCond5 === true || conditions.createARVisibleCond6 === false

addToStudyVisibleCond.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1AddToVerificationRequest && conditions.arVersionCondition && ctx.addToStudyVisibility!==null && ctx.addToStudyVisibility === true && (conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === true) && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Awb0Interface') < 0  && conditions.studyVisiblity === true && ctx.selected.props.crt1AddedToAnalysisRequest.dbValues[0] === '0'

AddToTestRequestVisibleCond.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1AddToVerificationRequest && conditions.arVersionCondition && ctx.addToStudyVisibility!==null && ctx.addToStudyVisibility === true && (conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === true) && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Awb0Interface') < 0 && conditions.testRequestVisiblity === true && conditions.isPhysicalBOMSelected === false && ctx.selected.props.crt1AddedToAnalysisRequest.dbValues[0] === '0'

AddToTestEventVisibleCond.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1AddToVerificationRequest && conditions.arVersionCondition && ctx.addToStudyVisibility!==null && ctx.addToStudyVisibility === true && (conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === true) && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Awb0Interface') < 0 && conditions.testEventVisiblity === true && conditions.isPhysicalBOMSelected === false && ctx.selected.props.crt1AddedToAnalysisRequest.dbValues[0] === '0'

AddToRunVisibleCond.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1AddToVerificationRequest && conditions.arVersionCondition && ctx.addToStudyVisibility!==null && ctx.addToStudyVisibility === true && (conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === true) && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Awb0Interface') < 0 && conditions.runVisiblity === true && ctx.selected.props.crt1AddedToAnalysisRequest.dbValues[0] === '0'

addToARVisibleCond.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1AddToVerificationRequest && conditions.arVersionCondition && ctx.addToARVisibility!==null && ctx.addToARVisibility === true && (conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsAROpenedObjectCond === true) && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === false && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === false && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Awb0Interface') < 0 && conditions.isPhysicalBOMSelected === false && ctx.selected.props.crt1AddedToAnalysisRequest.dbValues[0] === '0'

addToARFromProjectVisibleCond2.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1AddToVerificationRequest && ctx.openedARObject && ctx.openedARObject.type === 'Crt0VldnContractRevision' && (conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsAROpenedObjectCond === true) && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === false && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === false

crt1CreateARIsAROpen.expression: conditions.crt1CreateARIsAROpen1 === true && ( conditions.crt1CreateARIsAROpen3 === false || conditions.crt1CreateARIsAROpen2 === true) && (conditions.crt1CreateARIsAROpen5 === false || conditions.crt1CreateARIsAROpen4 === true)

toggleInOutForProxyTableVisible.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1ToggleInOutForProxyTable && ctx.selectedAttrProxyObjects.length > 0 && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Att0MeasurableAttribute') > -1 && ctx.editInProgress !== true && (conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsAROpenedObjectCond === true) && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === false

unuseAttrForProxyTableVisible.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1UnuseParameter && ctx.editInProgress !== true && ctx.selectedAttrProxyObjects.length > 0 && (conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsAROpenedObjectCond === true) && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === false && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === false && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Att0MeasurableAttribute') > -1

unuseAttrForStudyForProxyTableVisible.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1UnuseParameter && ctx.editInProgress !== true && ctx.selectedAttrProxyObjects.length > 0 && (conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === true) && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Att0MeasurableAttribute') > -1

crt1SyncMeasurableAttrVisibility.expression: (ctx.xrtSummaryContextObject.props.crt0State.dbValues[0] === '' || ctx.xrtSummaryContextObject.props.crt0State.dbValues[0] === 'Authoring' || ctx.xrtSummaryContextObject.props.crt0State.dbValues[0] === 'Submitted' || ctx.xrtSummaryContextObject.props.crt0State.dbValues[0] === 'Analyzing') && ctx.syncCandidates.length > 0 && conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === false && conditions.crt1IsVRCreatedByProjectCond === false && ctx.xrtSummaryContextObject.props.is_modifiable.dbValues[0] === '1'

crt1PublishMeasurableAttrVisibility.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1PublishMeasurableAttr && ctx.publishCandidates.length > 0 && conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === false && conditions.crt1IsVRCreatedByProjectCond === false

toggleInOutForMappedTableVisible.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1ToggleInOutForProxyTable && ctx.selectedProxyObjects.length > 0 && ctx.isMappingTableEditing === false && (ctx.isARAttrSelected === true || ctx.isUnuseAttrSelected === true) && (conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsAROpenedObjectCond === true) && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === false && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === false

toggleInOutForInDefTableVisible.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1ToggleInOutForProxyTable && ctx.selectedAttrProxyObjects.length > 0 && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Att0MeasurableAttribute') > -1 && ctx.ATTRIBUTE_TABLE_CONTEXT._editing !== true && (conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsAROpenedObjectCond === true) && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === false && ctx.selectedAttrProxyObjects[0].props.att1AttrInOut.dbValue !== 'not_available'

toggleInOutForStudyForMappedTableVisible.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1ToggleInOutForProxyTable && ctx.selectedProxyObjects.length > 0 && ctx.isMappingTableEditing === false && (conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === true)

setUnuseUsageForVRMappedTableVisibleCond.expression: conditions.unuseAttrForMappedTableVisible  && (ctx.isARAttrSelected === true || ctx.isUnuseAttrSelected === true) && conditions.isTcReleaseAtLeast131 === true && conditions.setUnuseUsageValidSelectionMappedTable

unuseAttrForMappedTableVisible.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1UnuseParameter && ctx.isMappingTableEditing === false && ctx.selectedProxyObjects.length > 0 && (conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsAROpenedObjectCond === true) && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === false && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === false

unuseAttrForInDefTableVisible.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1UnuseParameter && ctx.ATTRIBUTE_TABLE_CONTEXT._editing !== true && ctx.selectedAttrProxyObjects.length > 0 && (conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsAROpenedObjectCond === true) && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === false && conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === false && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Att0MeasurableAttribute') > -1 && ctx.selectedAttrProxyObjects[0].props.att1AttrInOut.dbValue !== 'unused' && ctx.selectedAttrProxyObjects[0].props.att1AttrInOut.dbValue !== 'not_available'

unuseAttrForStudyForMappedTableVisible.expression: ctx.visibleServerCommands.Crt1UnuseParameter && ctx.isMappingTableEditing === false && ctx.selectedProxyObjects.length > 0 && (conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsStudyOpenedObjectCond === true)

unusedAttrFilterForMappedTableVisible.expression: ctx.selected && ctx.isMappingTableEditing === false && ctx.xrtPageContext.secondaryXrtPageID !== 'tc_xrt_AttributesForDCP' && (conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsAROpenedObjectCond === true)

unusedAttrFilterForProxyTableVisible.expression: ctx.selected && ctx.editInProgress !== true && conditions.crt1IsVRCreatedByProjectCond === false && (conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsAROpenedObjectCond === true)

unusedAttrFilterForInDefTableVisible.expression: ctx.selected && ctx.ATTRIBUTE_TABLE_CONTEXT._editing !== true && ctx.xrtPageContext.secondaryXrtPageID !== 'tc_xrt_AttributesForDCP' && (conditions.Crt1IsAROpenCond === true || conditions.Crt1IsAROpenedObjectCond === true)
